name: Anti-Ragging Policy
answer_preview:
The Anti-Ragging Policy at KR Mangalam University (KRMU) includes a Zero Tolerance stance towards bullying and harassment. The policy defines ragging as any act that causes physical or psychological harm, fear, or embarrassment to a student, including but not limited to verbal abuse, intimidation, discrimination based on caste, religion, gender, or region.
